title: mclient crashes if real column is multiplied by it itself
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE raw.TEST_TABLE (ID INTEGER IDENTITY, VALUE FLOAT, DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO raw.TEST_TABLE (VALUE, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (3.5, 'Test value 1');
INSERT INTO raw.TEST_TABLE (VALUE, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (NULL, 'Test value 2');
SELECT VALUE * VALUE FROM raw.TEST_TABLE WHERE VALUE IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: Multiplying a REAL column by itself causes crash
